message:
fix(ci): stabilize CWD tests and bench binary lookup

- Serialize git-dir tests to prevent CWD races in CI
- Resolve aadc binary path via CARGO_BIN_EXE fallback for benches
- Refresh Cargo.lock after resolving dev dependency graph

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
